description: Create a visual logic flowchart in draw.io Desktop for a 'Cyberpunk Black Market' quest based on the script provided at ~/Desktop/quest_script.txt. The flowchart must map the dialogue, player choices, the three logic checks, and all four endings (Success, Scammed, Combat, and Arrested) using the following visual schema: NPC Lines (Rectangles), Player Choices (Parallelograms or Hexagons), Logic/Skill Checks (Diamonds/Rhombus), Events/Updates (Rounded Rectangles), and Endings (Ellipses/Circles). Connect the nodes with labeled arrows showing the flow conditions and logic outcomes. Save the diagram as ~/Desktop/quest_flow.drawio and export it as ~/Desktop/quest_flow.png.
